# JadedViber

> Personal brand site of Joshua Brown — homelab, AI workflows, neovim, and cyberpunk-styled development.

- Site: https://jadedviber.com
- Author: Joshua Brown
- Profile: https://github.com/jaded423

## Key pages
- [Home](https://jadedviber.com/): primary landing page
- [Homelab](https://jadedviber.com/homelab.html): Proxmox cluster + network topology
- [Now](https://jadedviber.com/now.html): current focus and active projects

## Projects
- [PhotoEditor](https://jadedviber.com/projects/photo-editor.html): macOS Tkinter app for bulk product-photo processing — rembg background removal, smart 1000×1000 crop, SKU banner stamping, webhook export.

## App & legal
- [JadedViber app](https://jadedviber.com/app/): personal Google Workspace automation tools (MCP servers + n8n) that act on your own Google account at your request.
- [Privacy Policy](https://jadedviber.com/privacy/): how the tools handle data, incl. Google API limited-use disclosure.
- [Terms of Service](https://jadedviber.com/terms/): terms governing use of the tools.

## About
Personal brand site of Joshua Brown — homelab, AI workflows, neovim, and cyberpunk-styled development. Vibe coder, homelab tinkerer, AI-driven development.
